equilibrium_analysis.mechanism: K_avg converges to edges-per-new-lesson rate. At equilibrium dK/dN=0 when K_avg = avg_new_edges. Current ~4.5 edges/lesson → K_avg → 4.5

s372_regression_model_test.diagnosis: Domain: field retroactive tagging inflates DOMEX_pct. Model dynamics correct (asymptote 4.32 ≈ data 4.5). Measurement variable (DOMEX_pct) is contaminated, not the relationship.

L601_rate_by_session_type.verdict: WITHIN NOISE — hub attachment is topic-general, not DOMEX-specific

expectations_vs_actual.s372_model_actual: 27% error at measured DOMEX_pct, but asymptote matches within 4%
expectations_vs_actual.s372_model_verdict: PARTIAL — dynamics correct, measurement variable contaminated

key_findings: K_avg equilibrium is ~4.5 (from edges-per-new-lesson convergence analysis)
S372 regression asymptote (4.32) matches data equilibrium (4.5) within 4%
L-601 hub attachment rate is topic-general (40% vs 37% for DOMEX vs non-DOMEX)
Hub attachment trend is moderately rising (r=0.595) — super-linear PA ongoing
Hub z acceleration continues (24.6→26.8) while K_avg rate decelerates
verdict: F-NK5 tracking at N=724. New finding: K_avg equilibrium ~4.5 from edges-per-lesson analysis, matching S372 model asymptote. Hub super-linear PA confirmed (r=0.595). S372 model dynamics vindicated but DOMEX_pct measurement contaminated.
